nasb.text: But after the death of Jehoiada the officials of Judah came and bowed down to the king, and the king listened to them.

esv.text: Now after the death of Jehoiada the princes of Judah came and paid homage to the king. Then the king listened to them.

cnv.text: 耶何耶大死後，猶大的領袖們來朝拜王；王聽從了他們的主意。

ccb.text: 耶何耶大死后，犹大众首领来朝拜王，王对他们言听计从。
